geography.data_source: GHMC ward map 2020, GHMC boundary shapefiles for Abids-Nampally-Koti zone

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Hyderabad district tables, GHMC population estimates 2023, central zone high density

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round (2020-21) Telangana urban tables, PLFS 2022-23, Abids-Nampally area commercial and government employment mix

commute_profile.data_source: HMR (L&T Hyderabad Metro) ridership reports 2023, TSRTC bus ridership data, convergence of all 3 metro lines at central zone

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Estimated from transit hub + examination hub hybrid zone, high exam sensitivity due to UPSC/TSPSC coaching concentration, Lokniti-CSDS 2024 Telangana data

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from central commercial zone mixing patterns, high cross-income bridging due to examination hub diversity, coaching centre networks

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from Abids commercial district footfall, GHMC commercial zone survey
Estimated from Koti-Nampally coaching centre concentration for UPSC/TSPSC/banking exam preparation
MGBS (Mahatma Gandhi Bus Station) daily passenger count from TSRTC reports, station area vendor estimates
Osmania General Hospital OPD footfall data, hospital employment estimates

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Hybrid Transit Hub/Mixed + Examination Hub template, adjusted for Abids-Nampally's dual character as commercial center and exam coaching hub

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from GHMC ward councillor count, coaching industry concentration, TSRTC/metro institutional presence
